ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "event_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location where the event takes place */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date the race was conducted */,
  "race_location" TEXT /* Location where the race took place */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., Regatta, Time Trial) */,
  "race_description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the race belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the race */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boat */,
  "sail_no" INTEGER /* Sail number of the boat */,
  "boat_name" TEXT /* Name of the boat */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat's owner */,
  "hcap" INTEGER /* Handicap rating of the boat */,
  "boat_type" TEXT /* Type of the boat (e.g., Monohull, Catamaran) */,
  "boat_length" INTEGER /* Length of the boat */,
  "boat_model" TEXT /* Model of the boat */,
  "boat_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the boat */,
  "boat_year" INTEGER /* Year the boat was manufactured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boats_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "owner_email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "owner_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race the result belongs to */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat the result belongs to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the boat in the race */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the boat in the race */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the boat */,
  "elapsed_time" TEXT /* Elapsed time of the boat */,
  "corrected_time" TEXT /* Corrected time of the boat */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the boat */,
  "race_outcome" TEXT /* Race outcome (e.g., Finished, Did Not Finish, Did Not Start) */,
  "finish_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the boat's finish position */,
  "finish_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the boat's finish position */,
  "penalty_time" TEXT /* Penalty time applied to the boat */,
  "final_rank" INTEGER /* Final rank of the boat after penalties */,
  "final_points" INTEGER /* Final points awarded to the boat after penalties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time data entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race the data belongs to */,
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boat the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the boat's position */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the boat's position */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the boat */,
  "heading" INTEGER /* Heading of the boat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_boat_id FOREIGN KEY ("boat_id") REFERENCES boats ("boat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_data_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)
